SM_DEPENDENT_PARAM_TYPE_MISMATCH

input/maps/IMMZ.C4.QRToPatient.fmlThe parameter 'immz' refers to the variable 'model : IMMZC4 (target)' but it's type is 'IMMZC' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'QRespToIMMZC', which is 'IMMZC' (from map 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/StructureMap/IMMZ.C4.QRToLM|0.2.0')
input/maps/IMMZ.Helpers.fmlThe parameter 'code' refers to the variable 'code : CodeableConcept (target)' but it's type is 'Coding' which is not compatible with the type required for the group 'MakeImmzObservation', which is 'Coding' (from map '$this')

fsh-generated/resources/Questionnaire-QIMMZD1.jsonThis SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Vaccine product containing Human poliovirus antigen (medicinal product)] and examples for no FSN: [Inactivated whole Human poliovirus antigen only vaccine product])
